_doc: Per-nation talent-generation metrics, keyed by ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code.
Two 0-100 ratings (default 50 = league-neutral when a code is absent):
investment  - top-end funding (academies, pro pathways). Drives the
elite-talent spike (chance a generated player is world-class).
grassroots  - breadth of development. Drives the average-quality lift
applied to every player from that nation.
Edit freely to make programmes ebb and flow between seasons. See
o27v2/nation_talent.py for how these map to player generation.
